description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the scorpil/rust:stable Docker image with stages build, test, docs, and deploy. Add a build job in the build stage that runs "mkdir -p target", "mkdir -p cargo", "du -hs target", "du -h cargo", "rustc --version && cargo --version", "cargo build --verbose --jobs 1 --release", stores the target/ and cargo/ directories as artifacts, and runs only on tags, the master branch, or branches matching the regex /^[0-9]+-.*$/ . Add a test job in the test stage that depends on build, runs "mkdir -p target", "mkdir -p cargo", "du -hs target", "du -hs cargo", "rustc --version && cargo --version", "cargo test --verbose --jobs 1 --release", saves the same artifacts, and has the same only rules. Add a docs job in the docs stage that depends on build, runs "mkdir -p target", "mkdir -p cargo", "du -hs target", "du -hs cargo", "cargo doc --jobs 1", stores target/ and cargo/ as artifacts, and also runs only on tags, master, or matching branches.
